dialogue.content: I am getting ready to make a decision about text summarization systems, and I would like to look beyond the basic product pages before settling it. That means looking for a recent independent comparison, at least one account of actual deployment, and documentation for any capability that could determine suitability. I will also keep drawbacks visible so that a strong result on the main requirement does not erase adoption costs, training needs, or limits that could still affect the decision.

Please search across a mixture of recent evaluations, implementation notes, and user reports. I am most interested in evidence connected to the actual use case, although practical drawbacks such as setup time or missing integrations still matter. Older discussions can be included if they help explain why an option has a certain reputation, but they should be identifiable as older. A compact collection of excerpts will be easier for me to work with than a polished comparison table.
